summary: Iteration 134: Tested 3 new standalone PWA apps (AppCliente, AppComerciales, AppInstaladores) and download ZIP endpoints. All features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - apps use mock data for leads/jobs
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 standalone PWA apps created: /app-cliente (alarm control), /app-comerciales (sales catalog), /app-instaladores (job agenda). Each has separate localStorage tokens (cliente_token, comercial_token, instalador_token). Stock/cookie popups need dismissal before testing. Download ZIPs available at /downloads/ManoProtect-CRA-Operador.zip, /downloads/ManoProtect-CRM-Ventas.zip, /downloads/ManoProtect-Build-Kit.zip
